speaker: alice
text: Let's dive straight into some environmental wins that'll put a smile on your face. Portugal just smashed their renewable energy record - <cite index='11-10'>a staggering 80.7 per cent of the country's electricity generated in January 2026 came from renewable energy</cite>.

speaker: charlie
text: That's incredible, mate! And speaking of clever solutions, <cite index='11-13'>Finland is harnessing the unexpected power of sand to decarbonise industrial heat</cite>. Who would've thought sand could be such a game-changer?

speaker: alice
text: But here's the story that really knocked my socks off - scientists have discovered that <cite index='13-5'>mycorrhizal fungi are responsible for drawing down around 13 billion tons of CO₂ each year, which is roughly a third of global fossil fuel emissions</cite>. These underground networks are basically Earth's own carbon capture system!
